'''Didier Cabestany''' (13 May 1969 – 16 February 2020)<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/didier-cabestany-nous-a-quittes/ |title=Didier Cabestany nous a quittés |publisher=Fédération Française de Rugby à XIII |date=16 February 2020 |accessdate=25 February 2020}}</ref> was a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who represented [[France national rugby league team|France]] at the [[1995 Rugby League World Cup|1995 World Cup]].<ref name=rlp/>

Cabestany played for [[Paris Saint-Germain Rugby League|Paris Saint-Germain]] in the 1996 and 1997 [[Super League]] competitions and later played for [[Catalans Dragons|UTC]].<ref name=rlp/>
